name: GPXZ Elevation API
description: The GPXZ API provides worldwide elevation data via a REST API. It offers high-resolution elevation lookups for single points, multiple points, sampled paths, and 2D raster extracts. It also provides compatibility endpoints for Google Maps Elevation API and Open Topo Data API.
